explanation: Inserted quotes around the file path to test if the rule handles quoted paths correctly.
Removed space between -f and the file path to test if the rule detects the flag-value concatenation.
Omitted the -b flag to test if the rule still detects the presence of the -f flag and .zip file.
Used a colon after -f to test if the rule handles alternate flag-value syntax.
Changed the file extension to .7z to test if the rule is specific to .zip files.
Used an environment variable to represent the file path to test if the rule handles variable expansion.
Reordered the flags to test if the rule is sensitive to argument order.
